Query
  Pipeline
    Stage extend
      Assign has_error
        Call if
          Call exists
            Ident error
          String "yes"
          String "no"
      Assign has_amount
        Call if
          Call exists
            Ident amount_cents
          String "yes"
          String "no"
    Stage stats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call count
      By
        Ident has_error
        Ident has_amount
    Stage sort
      SortKey +
        Ident has_error
      SortKey +
        Ident has_amount
